leadText: The Soot Sack (Japanese: はいぶくろ Ash Sack) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Soot Sack allows the player to collect volcanic ash on Route 113 or Jagged Pass R S E . It has a maximum capacity of 9,999 steps' worth of ash in Generation III.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A sack used to gather and hold volcanic ash. FR LG A sack used to collect volcanic ash automatically during walks over deep ash. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A sack used to gather and hold volcanic ash.
